summary: Arguably one of the poorer stylistic top nations, but loaded with players as ever — a 4-3-3 / 4-2-3-1 around the best CF in the world. Can the squad put it together?
style: 4-3-3 / 4-2-3-1 — play to get wingers 1v1, crosses into the box, counter/transition at speed, runs in behind, central block structure.

counterReliance.note: Counter/transition at speed alongside 1v1 wide play

strengths: Counter/transition at speed and runs in behind
Harry Kane's elite link play and finishing
weaknesses: "Style of play" weaker than peer top nations

keyPlayers.name: Harry Kane
keyPlayers.note: Best CF in world football — 60 goals this season, great link-up

tactics: Get the wingers 1v1, cross for Kane, break at pace and run in behind from a central block. The talent is there as always — the question is whether they finally put it together.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
